verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You're my Joy - You're my peace, You're my comfort in time of need You're my refuge - you're my rock You're the one I depend on You're the road to hope when the light grows dim When the waves of doubt come crashing in You're my anchor in the troubled storm Almighty God!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You're my Joy -you're my peace, You're my comfort in time of need You're my refuge- you're my rock- You're the one I depend on You're the road to hope when the light grows dim When the waves of doubt come crashing in You're my anchor in the troubled storm Almighty God!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You bore the Cross and You bare the Scars You're my bright and shining Star You gave me sight that I might see The kind of person that I should be You came to die to set me free Almighty God!
